title: Evangelion3010 First 12 minutes 10 seconds online preview March 8th
display_title: Evangelion3010 First 12 minutes 10 seconds online preview March 8th
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 First 12 minutes 10 seconds online preview [March 8th]             Quote Post by Joseki » Wed Mar 03, 2021 4:28 am https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uFuWWr3481w Khara announced the first 12 minutes, 10 seconds of Shin Eva will be premiered online on YouTube, Twitter and Prime Video Japan on the midnight of March 8th.

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 First 12 minutes 10 seconds online preview [March 8th]             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Wed Mar 03, 2021 4:33 am Looks like a prelude to a definite shin eva full showing in the months to come on prime

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 First 12 minutes 10 seconds online preview [March 8th]             Quote Post by UltraB116 » Wed Mar 03, 2021 4:37 am The 0706 operation?

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 First 12 minutes 10 seconds online preview [March 8th]             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Wed Mar 03, 2021 4:55 am UltraB116 wrote: The 0706 operation?

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 First 12 minutes 10 seconds online preview [March 8th]             Quote Post by Joseki » Wed Mar 03, 2021 5:08 am I actually think they enlarged AVANT1 with some extra cuts. I'm more curious about the graphical changes personally, I bet they polished it a lot.

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 First 12 minutes 10 seconds online preview [March 8th]             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Wed Mar 03, 2021 5:09 am I don’t believe the 4 min recap is part of the real thing As while it was shown before avant 1 in Paris it didn’t count towards the 10 mins

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 First 12 minutes 10 seconds online preview [March 8th]             Quote Post by FXArmaros98 » Wed Mar 03, 2021 5:26 am I think in those 2 more minutes instead of showing us Shinji, Asuka and Rei Q walking in the red land maybe we could see a conversation between Gendo and Fuyutsuki about the progress of their plans and the fact that their attack on Paris was just a diversion for distract Wille while they were retrieving Evangelion 13. Or we could simply see Misato deep in her thought, perhaps thinking about Kaji and Shinji, maybe even show us the place where she could have hidden her cross.

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 First 12 minutes 10 seconds online preview [March 8th]             Quote Post by Mr. M » Wed Mar 03, 2021 5:26 am It would be' interesting to analyze the differences between the 0706 version and this Final Cut (apart from the new 2 minutes)

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 First 12 minutes 10 seconds online preview [March 8th]             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed Mar 03, 2021 5:29 am They're really teasing us here Either it's the same thing really beefed up (I will never complain about more of Mari action) or those last 2 minutes are gonna be a whammy. Anything pertaining to the "wasteland scene" with the OG trio would get ppl excited but I'd been thinking that it would be a slow scene probably so I wonder if 2 min are enough for it to 'land'.

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 First 12 minutes 10 seconds online preview [March 8th]             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Wed Mar 03, 2021 5:38 am FXArmaros98 wrote: I think in those 2 more minutes instead of showing us Shinji, Asuka and Rei Q walking in the red land maybe we could see a conversation between Gendo and Fuyutsuki about the progress of their plans and the fact that their attack on Paris was just a diversion for distract Wille while they were retrieving Evangelion 13. Or we could simply see Misato deep in her thought, perhaps thinking about Kaji and Shinji, maybe even show us the place where she could have hidden her cross.

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 First 12 minutes 10 seconds online preview [March 8th]             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Mar 03, 2021 6:34 am Joseki wrote: I actually think they enlarged AVANT1 with some extra cuts. I'm more curious about the graphical changes personally, I bet they polished it a lot.

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 First 12 minutes 10 seconds online preview [March 8th]             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Wed Mar 03, 2021 6:41 am It is reported that it is the first 12 minutes and 10 seconds of the film: 冒頭12分10秒10コマ Beginning 12 minutes, 10 seconds and 10 frames (literal translation)

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 First 12 minutes 10 seconds online preview [March 8th]             Quote Post by Line » Wed Mar 03, 2021 6:49 am I'm super excited now, can't wait for these 12 mins, aaaah!! I'm like one of those teenager hyper impatient to meet his/her favorite popstar honestly ! Before I didn't understand those kind of people now as for merely what, five or six days, I'll be in their shoes.... I'm so much impatient that's it's stressing me, think I'm gonna faint ! I gotta have to occupy my mind with a subsistute obssesion until the Day. Not mentioning that's it's is just the twelve minutes of the movie, and not the finished product itself.

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 First 12 minutes 10 seconds online preview [March 8th]             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Mar 03, 2021 7:17 am FXArmaros98 wrote: I think in those 2 more minutes instead of showing us Shinji, Asuka and Rei Q walking in the red land maybe we could see a conversation between Gendo and Fuyutsuki about the progress of their plans and the fact that their attack on Paris was just a diversion for distract Wille while they were retrieving Evangelion 13. Or we could simply see Misato deep in her thought, perhaps thinking about Kaji and Shinji, maybe even show us the place where she could have hidden her cross.

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 First 12 minutes 10 seconds online preview [March 8th]             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Mar 03, 2021 8:14 am Khara: There will be no archive. Me: ... by you .

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 First 12 minutes 10 seconds online preview [March 8th]             Quote Post by Joseki » Wed Mar 03, 2021 8:15 am Nya Nya Nya, as Mari says

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 First 12 minutes 10 seconds online preview [March 8th]             Quote Post by FXArmaros98 » Wed Mar 03, 2021 9:05 am Actually we know what we're getting in the second scene! It really is Shinji and co. continuing their walk. It really is Shinji and co. continuing their walk. We know this from the july 2019 trailer, which designated those shots as being from scene 2.

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 First 12 minutes 10 seconds online preview [March 8th]             Quote Post by cyharding » Wed Mar 03, 2021 9:33 am Is there any confirmation whether this will be geolocked or not?

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 First 12 minutes 10 seconds online preview [March 8th]             Quote Post by hui43210 » Wed Mar 03, 2021 9:51 am cyharding wrote: Is there any confirmation whether this will be geolocked or not?

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 First 12 minutes 10 seconds online preview [March 8th]             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Mar 03, 2021 9:53 am The YouTube channel has the livestream set up already, and it plays the trailer until the actual stream starts. I’d suspect none of that would be visible to me using US servers if it were region locked.
